_comment: sites/<your-site>/site_config.json — site-level overrides. Only include keys you want to change from bench defaults.
_scenario_A: Inherit all R2 config from common_site_config.json → omit all r2_* keys
_scenario_B: Different bucket (or bucket+sub-folder) for this site. r2_bucket = 'bucket' or 'bucket/folder/subfolder'.
_scenario_C: Different credentials + CDN for a staging site
_scenario_D: Opt OUT of R2 for this site — fall back to local disk even if bench has use_r2=1
_scenario_E: Optional new prefix layout for a site like agmc.b2b.markethq.in -> markethq/b2b/agmc
